hooks.command:
{ printf '
## %s
' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z')"; printf -- '- branch: %s
' "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"; dirty=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^??' | wc -l | tr -d ' '); untracked=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -c '^??' || true); printf -- '- dirty: %s, untracked: %s
' "$dirty" "$untracked"; printf -- '- last commit: '; git log -1 --format='%h %s (%ar)' 2>/dev/null || printf 'none
'; printf '
'; } >> SESSION-LOG.md 2>/dev/null || true
